title: Home Row: F and J
description: Start with the anchor keys. Your index fingers rest here.
content: fjfj jfjf fjfj jfjf fj jf ff jj fj jf fjfjfj jfjfjf fff jjj fj jf fjfj

title: Home Row: D and K
description: Add your middle fingers. Keep anchors on F and J.
content: dkdk kdkd dkdk fdjk jkdf dkfj fjdk ddk kkd fjdk dkfj kdjf fjdk dk kd dkfj fjdk jkdf

title: Home Row: S and L
description: Add your ring fingers. The home row is taking shape.
content: slsl lsls sldf jkls sldkfj fjkdls sldf lkjf dskl lsdk fjkdls sldkfj fj dk sl ls kd jf

title: Home Row: A and semicolon
description: Complete the home row. All eight fingers placed.
content: asdf jkl; ;lkj fdsa asdf ;lkj fdsa asdf jkl; asdfjkl; ;lkjfdsa asdf jkl; fdsa ;lkj ask all

title: Home Row: Words
description: Real words using only the home row. You can do this!
content: ask all fall flask slash sad lads dad flask asks adds fads lads flask asks all fall sad lads dad fads

title: Top Row: E and I
description: Reach up with your middle fingers to E and I.
content: eiei ieie edge idle dike eide eidei fiej jedi idea edit side die life ride ride file side

title: Top Row: R and U
description: Index fingers reach up to R and U.
content: ruru urur rude rule ruse rule rustle ride side rule rude sure fire ire elf sure ride rule ruse fire

title: Top Row: T and Y
description: Both index fingers stretch to T and Y.
content: tyty ytyt try yet tire tired yield style dusty stay yell tell tall yet try style tide title study

title: Top Row: W and O
description: Ring fingers reach to W and O.
content: wow owe two low row work word wore woke world wood wise wore word rows owes work flow slow show wood

title: Top Row: Q and P
description: Pinky fingers take Q and P to complete the top row.
content: quick quiet quip prep prop drip trip drip pork fork pour power quite prepare proper quirky power drop

title: Bottom Row: V and M
description: Index fingers reach down to V and M.
content: vim vim move vim move vim very vim vim move vim very move vim vim drive vim move gave vim

title: Bottom Row: C and comma
description: Middle fingers drop down to C and comma.
content: come, cats, code, click, nice, rice, mice, lace, case, call, mica, ice, race, cool, code, crumble, click

title: Bottom Row: X and period
description: Ring fingers reach down to X and period.
content: fox. six. tax. mix. wax. fix. exit. next. text. flex. relax. exact. index. oxide. pixel. reflex. flux.

title: Bottom Row: Z and slash
description: Pinkies take Z and slash to complete the bottom row.
content: zip/zero zig/zag fizz/jazz fuzz/buzz zone/maze size/prize blaze/maze froze/graze prize/size zero/zone

title: Full Alphabet: Common Words
description: All letters now. Type common English words with confidence.
content: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs

title: Capital Letters: Left Hand
description: Hold right Shift with your pinky to capitalize left-hand keys.
content: Ask Sara. Feed Dogs. Get Real. Take Water. Eat Fast. Draw Art. Saw Trees. Ask Sara. Real Dreams. Fast Cars.

title: Capital Letters: Right Hand
description: Hold left Shift with your pinky to capitalize right-hand keys.
content: Hello John. Kill Moles. Yell Inside. Open Ports. Humble Homes. Join Knots. Iron Mill. Jump High. Like Monks.

title: Capitals: Sentences
description: Start sentences with capital letters naturally.
content: The cat sat. Dogs run fast. She likes ice. He wants more. They came home. We left early. It works well.

title: Capitals: Proper Nouns
description: Names, places, and brands — practice capitalizing them.
content: Alice went to Paris. Bob lives in Tokyo. Google is in California. Amazon ships worldwide. Apple makes iPhones.

title: Capitals: Mixed Practice
description: Everything mixed together. You are halfway through the course.
content: She said Hello. He replied Yes. The Sun rises East. We build Great things. Life moves Fast. Think Big. Start Now.

title: Numbers: 1 2 3 4 5
description: Left half of the number row. Stretch your fingers up.

title: Numbers: 6 7 8 9 0
description: Right half of the number row.

title: Numbers: Mixed
description: All ten digits together. Type phone numbers and codes.

title: Numbers in Sentences
description: Numbers mixed with words, the way they appear in real text.
content: I have 3 cats. She is 25 years old. The year is 2024. Call 911 now. He scored 100 points. Buy 2 apples.

title: Punctuation: Period and Comma
description: End sentences and separate clauses with confidence.
content: I went to the store, bought milk, eggs, and bread. She smiled, waved, and walked away. The dog barked, then stopped.

title: Punctuation: Question and Exclamation
description: Questions and emphasis. Shift + / and Shift + 1.
content: Are you sure? Yes! What is that? Amazing! Can you help? Of course! Where did they go? Right here! Really?

title: Punctuation: Quotes and Apostrophe
description: Dialogue and contractions. Important for natural writing.
content: She said "hello there" and smiled. It's a great day. He can't stop. They're here. I won't go. "Let's do this!"

title: Symbols: Dash and Underscore
description: Hyphens in compound words and underscores in code.
content: self-aware long-term well-known my_variable user_id first_name last_name get_data set_value is_valid load_file

title: Symbols: Brackets and Parens
description: Code-heavy symbols. Essential for programming.
content: func(arg) list[0] dict{key} if (x > 0) { return True } def foo(a, b): [1, 2, 3] {'name': 'Alice'} (x + y)

title: Final Challenge
description: The full keyboard. Numbers, symbols, capitals — everything you have learned.
content: In 2024, Alice (age 28) asked: "Why does Python use 4-space indentation?" Bob replied, "It's in PEP 8!" She said, "That's great — I'll remember that." He added, "func(x, y) returns (x + y) * 2."
